description: MTK (Moberg Toolkit) — language-agnostic workflow skills with pluggable tech stacks (.NET, Python, TypeScript). Commands, agents, references, and settings for consistent AI-assisted development.

skills/implement/SKILL.md.description: Full feature implementation workflow — orchestrates planning, batching, review, and verification skills

skills/setup-bootstrap/SKILL.md.description: One-time setup: detect tech stack, audit codebase, generate CLAUDE.md

skills/setup-audit/SKILL.md.description: Audit architecture principles, or with --merge unify audits from multiple repos

skills/fix/SKILL.md.description: Lightweight bug-fix workflow — debugging, targeted tests, scope-guarded verification

skills/pre-commit-review/SKILL.md.description: Fast security-focused review of staged changes; run before every commit

agents/compliance-reviewer.md.description: Adversarial code reviewer that loads stack-specific guidelines from the active tech stack

agents/test-reviewer.md.description: Focused reviewer for test completeness and verification quality

agents/architecture-reviewer.md.description: Focused reviewer for architectural fit and slice boundaries

settings.json.description: Generic permissions, hooks, and tool configuration. Protected — never overwritten during update.

references/review-finding-schema.md.description: Canonical output schema for all review entry points (markdown table + fenced JSON with confidence scores)

review-config.json.description: Review threshold and verdict configuration. Per-engineer overrides go in .claude/review-config.local.json (gitignored).

references/testing-patterns.md.description: Generic testing guidance — load alongside the active stack's testing supplement

references/security-checklist.md.description: Shared, language-agnostic security checklist for serious software

references/domain-finance.md.description: Finance domain supplement — concrete examples of regulated state, sensitive data, and audit requirements for fintech codebases

references/performance-checklist.md.description: Generic performance checklist — load alongside the active stack's performance supplement

references/recommended-tooling.md.description: Stack-agnostic recommended MCPs, plugins, and editor integrations printed during setup-bootstrap (recommend-only, never auto-installed)

references/dotnet/ef-core-checklist.md.description: EF Core review and implementation checklist

references/dotnet/testing-supplement.md.description: .NET-specific testing guidance (EF Core providers, xUnit/NUnit conventions)

references/dotnet/performance-supplement.description: .NET-specific performance rules (EF Core, HttpClient, Lambda cold starts)

references/dotnet/recommended-tooling.md.description: .NET recommended MCPs, plugins, and editor integrations (csharp-lsp, dotnet-claude-kit, microsoft-learn, JetBrains MCP)

references/python/coding-guidelines.md.description: Python coding style guide (placeholder — to be authored when first Python project starts)

references/python/testing-supplement.md.description: pytest patterns, fixtures, mocking, async tests

references/python/performance-supplement.description: Python performance rules (async, connection pooling, GIL, Lambda)

references/python/recommended-tooling.md.description: Python recommended MCPs, plugins, and editor integrations (context7, Pyright/basedpyright, Ruff LSP)

references/typescript/coding-guidelines..description: TypeScript coding style guide (placeholder — defaults to strict tsconfig + Biome until team authors its own)

references/typescript/data-layer-checkli.description: Prisma / Drizzle / TanStack Query review and implementation checklist

references/typescript/framework-patterns.description: React / Next.js / Tauri / Node backend structural conventions

references/typescript/testing-supplement.description: Vitest / Jest / Playwright / RTL / MSW patterns and TanStack Query test setup

references/typescript/performance-supple.description: Bundle size, rendering, SSR, Node I/O, serverless cold-start, and Tauri IPC performance rules

references/typescript/recommended-toolin.description: TypeScript recommended MCPs, plugins, and editor integrations (context7, playwright, editor LSPs, frontend-design plugin)

skills/spec-driven-development/SKILL.md.description: Language-agnostic planning skill for substantial changes

skills/planning-and-task-breakdown/SKILL.description: Reusable task breakdown and batching skill

skills/debugging-and-error-recovery/SKIL.description: Reusable bug-fix and debugging workflow skill

skills/code-review-and-quality/SKILL.md.description: Reusable review workflow skill for serious software

skills/context-engineering/SKILL.md.description: Reusable context loading and re-anchoring skill

skills/security-and-hardening/SKILL.md.description: Reusable security and hardening workflow for serious software

skills/source-driven-development/SKILL.m.description: Reusable framework verification and source-grounding skill

skills/code-simplification/SKILL.md.description: Reusable behavior-preserving cleanup and simplification skill

skills/verification-before-completion/SK.description: Reusable verification discipline — no completion claims without fresh evidence

skills/spec-drift-detection/SKILL.md.description: Compare the implementation against the spec's JSON sidecar manifest; surface divergence before review

skills/brainstorming/SKILL.md.description: Reusable design exploration skill — divergent thinking before spec commitment

skills/using-git-worktrees/SKILL.md.description: Reusable worktree setup and teardown with safety checks

skills/writing-skills/SKILL.md.description: Meta-skill for authoring new skills with TDD discipline and CSO principle

skills/correction-capture/SKILL.md.description: Reusable correction capture and compounding skill

skills/handoff/SKILL.md.description: Model-invoked session handoff — capture state into a recovery artifact when context is tight or work is paused

skills/tech-stack-dotnet/SKILL.md.description: .NET tech stack: build/test commands, EF Core guidance, MediatR patterns, scan recipes

skills/tech-stack-python/SKILL.md.description: Python tech stack: pytest, ruff, SQLAlchemy/Django guidance, FastAPI patterns, scan recipes

skills/tech-stack-typescript/SKILL.md.description: TypeScript tech stack: package manager auto-detect (bun/pnpm/yarn/npm), React/Next.js/Tauri/Node patterns, Prisma/Drizzle/TanStack Query guidance, scan recipes

tests/pressure-tests/security-hardening-.description: Adversarial pressure test for security-and-hardening skill

tests/pressure-tests/verification-pressu.description: Adversarial pressure test for verification-before-completion skill

tests/pressure-tests/code-review-pressur.description: Adversarial pressure test for code-review skill

tests/pressure-tests/confidence-scoring-.description: Adversarial pressure test for confidence-scored review output (inflation and sandbagging)

tests/pressure-tests/spec-drift-pressure.description: Adversarial pressure test for spec-drift-detection (silent repair, fabricated manifest, out-of-scope scope creep)

hooks/verify-completion.description: Stop hook flagging completion claims without command output evidence

hooks/pre-commit-linters.sh.description: Deterministic static-check pass: scans staged diff for known-bad patterns, emits findings with source:linter and confidence:100

hooks/security-gate.sh.description: PreToolUse hook that blocks destructive Bash commands (DB drops, force-push to main, broad rm)

hooks/post-compact.sh.description: PostCompact hook that re-injects tech stack, in-progress specs, plans, and task state after auto-compaction

hooks/git-hooks/pre-commit.description: Git pre-commit hook that runs the deterministic linter and blocks commits on critical findings

hooks/linter-patterns/core/secrets.txt.description: Core lint pack — language-agnostic secret detection (API keys, JWTs, connection strings)

hooks/linter-patterns/core/slopwatch.txt.description: Core lint pack — LLM reward hacking patterns (disabled tests, empty catches, always-pass assertions)

hooks/linter-patterns/stack-dotnet/patte.description: Stack lint pack — .NET patterns (raw SQL interpolation, console output, empty catches)

hooks/linter-patterns/stack-python/patte.description: Stack lint pack — Python patterns (raw SQL in execute, bare except, print debugging)

hooks/linter-patterns/stack-typescript/p.description: Stack lint pack — TypeScript/JS patterns (SQL template literals, console output, any type)

hooks/linter-patterns/domain-finance/pat.description: Domain lint pack — finance patterns (float money, hardcoded currencies/rates, unrounded division)

AGENTS.md.description: Cross-agent conventions file — generated by scripts/generate-agents-md.sh, protected during update

docs/skill-anatomy.md.description: Authoring anatomy for reusable skills (workflow + tech stack types)

scripts/run-evals.sh.description: Eval pipeline runner: lists scenarios, supports manual or automated execution (via EVAL_EXECUTOR / EVAL_GRADER env hooks)

evals/README.md.description: Eval pipeline overview, directory layout, and manual/automated run guidance

evals/security-and-hardening/eval-01-har.description: Positive eval: hardcoded DB connection string must be flagged critical

evals/security-and-hardening/eval-02-pur.description: Negative eval: pure internal refactor must not trigger security findings

evals/security-and-hardening/eval-03-int.description: Adversarial eval: 'internal endpoint, skip auth' pressure — missing auth must stay critical

evals/pre-commit-review/eval-01-sql-conc.description: Positive eval: raw SQL with string interpolation must be flagged critical

evals/pre-commit-review/eval-02-docs-onl.description: Negative eval: docs-only diff must pass with substantive rationale, no fabricated findings

evals/pre-commit-review/eval-03-inflate-.description: Adversarial eval: cosmetic rename with pressure to surface findings — must resist inflation

evals/verification-before-completion/eva.description: Positive eval: completion claim without cited command output must be blocked
Negative eval: completion with exit code + test counts must be accepted cleanly
Adversarial eval: 'trivial change, obvious compilation' must still require build evidence

tests/pressure-tests/test-reviewer-press.description: Adversarial pressure test for test-reviewer (weak assertions, false coverage, mock divergence)

tests/pressure-tests/architecture-review.description: Adversarial pressure test for architecture-reviewer (cross-slice deps, precedent-as-excuse, YAGNI)

hooks/verify-behavioral-diff.sh.description: Advisory hook that warns when a recent spec is missing a behavioral_diff field

hooks/scope-guard.sh.description: PreToolUse hook that warns when editing files not in the active spec's change_manifest — anti-rationalization scope guard

hooks/context-budget.sh.description: PostToolUse hook that tracks session activity and warns when context budget is getting heavy

hooks/capture-learnings.sh.description: Stop hook that reminds agent to capture learnings after substantial sessions and suggests CLAUDE.md promotion for repeated patterns

hooks/check-prerequisites.sh.description: Checks for recommended development tools per tech stack during setup-bootstrap

hooks/session-analytics.sh.description: Stop hook that persists session stats to .claude/analytics.json for team adoption tracking

scripts/run-benchmarks.sh.description: Deterministic effectiveness benchmarks for linter patterns, security gate, scope guard, and verification hooks

scripts/analytics-report.sh.description: Prints a formatted summary of MTK usage stats from .claude/analytics.json

benchmarks/fixtures/known-bad.diff.description: Known-bad code fixture for benchmark testing — contains secrets, SQL injection, disabled tests, float money

benchmarks/fixtures/known-good.diff.description: Known-good code fixture for benchmark testing — clean code that should produce zero false positives

scripts/generate-agents-md.sh.description: Generates a portable AGENTS.md for cross-agent compatibility (Cursor, Copilot, Gemini, Codex)

scripts/generate-tool-configs.sh.description: Generates native config files for non-Claude AI tools (Cursor MDC rules, Copilot instructions, Windsurf, Gemini, Cline)

.github/workflows/validate.yml.description: GitHub Actions workflow — runs validate-toolkit.sh and secret scanning on every PR

.github/pull_request_template.md.description: PR template with summary, changes, verification checklist, and breaking changes sections

references/dotnet/analyzer-config.md.description: Recommended Roslyn analyzer NuGet packages and .editorconfig rules for .NET

references/python/analyzer-config.md.description: Recommended ruff rules, mypy strict config, and bandit security checks for Python

references/typescript/analyzer-config.md.description: Recommended tsconfig strict settings and biome lint rules for TypeScript

hooks/parse-build-diagnostics.sh.description: Parses build tool diagnostics (dotnet build, ruff, tsc, biome) into review-finding-schema JSON with source:analyzer

hooks/analyzer-severity/dotnet.txt.description: .NET Roslyn analyzer rule-to-severity mappings (EF1001→critical, CA2007→warning, etc.)

hooks/analyzer-severity/python.txt.description: Python ruff/bandit rule-to-severity mappings (S101→critical, B006→warning, etc.)

tests/pressure-tests/analyzer-integratio.description: Adversarial pressure test for analyzer integration (no pre-commit builds, stale output, fabrication)

hooks/merge-settings.sh.description: Merges two settings.json files by unioning arrays (allowedTools, deny, hooks) without clobbering

CHANGELOG.md.description: Keep-a-changelog format documenting MTK version history and upgrade notes

.mcp.json.description: MCP server declaration for mtk-context (reference resolution, solution structure)

mcp/package.json.description: MCP server package manifest — dependencies and build script for mtk-context

mcp/tsconfig.json.description: TypeScript config for MCP server compilation

mcp/src/index.ts.description: MCP server entry point — registers tools and starts stdio transport

mcp/src/tools/resolve-references.ts.description: MCP tool — matches changed files against manifest globs to resolve relevant reference docs

mcp/src/tools/solution-structure.ts.description: MCP tool — parses .sln/csproj/pyproject.toml/package.json into unified project structure

scripts/build-mcp.sh.description: Build script for the MCP server — runs esbuild to produce dist/mtk-mcp-server.cjs

hooks/ci-status.sh.description: Bash helper wrapping gh CLI for CI status — outputs structured JSON for review skills

tests/pressure-tests/mcp-fallback-pressu.description: Adversarial pressure test for MCP fallback paths (server unavailable, empty results, errors)

hooks/api-compat-check.sh.description: API backward compatibility checker — detects removed routes, changed DTOs, removed public properties

skills/mtk/SKILL.md.description: Unified entry point — routes natural language to the right MTK workflow skill (fix, implement, review, status)

skills/mtk-setup/SKILL.md.description: Unified setup entry point — dispatches to bootstrap (first-time) or audit (re-scan) workflow skills

skills/context-report/SKILL.md.description: Diagnostic snapshot of active MTK configuration — tech stack, linter packs, domains, hooks, references

skills/toolkit-health/SKILL.md.description: Historical usage-pulse report from .claude/analytics.json with anomaly flags and suggested actions

tests/pressure-tests/toolkit-health-pres.description: Adversarial pressure test for toolkit-health (corrupt analytics, stale data, empty state, noise-to-anomaly)

docs/parallelism-patterns.md.description: Reference for parallel tool-call patterns (ref loading, reviewer fan-out, deferred-tool batch) used by entry skills

scripts/ci-lint.sh.description: CI wrapper for deterministic linter — emits GitHub Actions annotations and step summary

templates/ci/pr-lint.yml.description: GitHub Actions template — deterministic lint on every PR (no API keys needed)

templates/ci/pr-review.yml.description: GitHub Actions template — deterministic lint + Claude Code AI review on PRs (requires ANTHROPIC_API_KEY)

examples/README.md.description: Index of real-world CLAUDE.md templates grouped by tech stack

examples/dotnet-akka-cluster-CLAUDE.md.description: CLAUDE.md template for .NET 8 + Akka.NET cluster projects (finance domain example)

examples/python-fastapi-CLAUDE.md.description: CLAUDE.md template for Python 3.12 + FastAPI + SQLAlchemy 2.0 projects

examples/typescript-nextjs-CLAUDE.md.description: CLAUDE.md template for TypeScript + Next.js 15 (App Router) + Prisma + tRPC projects

examples/user-level-CLAUDE.md.description: Personal overrides template for ~/.claude/CLAUDE.md — layers on top of project rules
